anchors.redactedExcerpt: Synaptic Mesh should be evaluated as operational AI memory and coherence for continuity, not as generic retrieval or generic RAG.
Passive evidence can support human review only; it must stay local, read-only, non-authoritative, separate from durable memory writes, and separate from effects.
A ladder that only repeats readiness work conflicts with the current goal; each step should cross or measure a real safe usefulness barrier.
Treating Synaptic Mesh as generic RAG is stale negative context; the useful direction is continuity, source binding, contradictions, and project rules.
